name: Portal Gun
description: Third-person portal-gun — key 1 = open portal, key 2 = portal blast, key 3 = close portal; director: cyberpunk-city portal / forest portal

base.default: A single rotating, swirling portal projected ahead: a shimmering liquid vortex ringed with drifting particles and rippling distortion, another world faintly visible through its centre. The world contains EXACTLY ONE swirling portal directly ahead at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE tall support pillar on the left at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE stack of industrial crates on the right at a fixed position. A dim, fog-filled chamber of dark metal walls and scattered machinery, thick volumetric haze catching shafts of light. Dramatic cinematic lighting, ray-traced reflections on wet metal, deep depth of field, Unreal Engine 5 rendering, hyper-realistic, 8K.

player.default: A lone figure gripping a large futuristic heavy-duty portable teleportation device in both hands — a portal gun with glowing blue nozzles, intricate mechanical detailing, brushed-metal plating and an aged, worn industrial look. EXACTLY ONE figure holding EXACTLY ONE portal gun — a single lone person, no duplicate and no clone.

default.static: Over-the-shoulder third-person view from behind the figure, the figure and the glowing portal device centred in frame at constant size, the swirling portal visible ahead — never a first-person view. Neither the figure nor the camera moves; look-input is the only camera motion, arcing around the stationary centred figure while held.
default.dynamic: Strict over-the-shoulder third-person view from close behind the figure, its back and the portal device filling frame centre, the swirling portal ahead — never first-person. It holds a fixed position behind the figure and tracks it forward; look-input becomes the figure changing heading.

default.static: The figure stands still in the fog, weight settled, the portal device humming in its grip and casting flickering blue light across its arms as the swirling vortex ahead pulses and drifts and volumetric haze curls around its boots.
default.dynamic: The figure advances at a steady pace through the fog-filled chamber, boots echoing on the dark metal floor, the portal device held ready and its blue glow sweeping the walls as machinery and drifting haze slide past.

events.name: Open Portal
events.detail: The figure levels the portal device and fires; a fresh swirling portal blooms open ahead on the chamber wall — a spinning liquid vortex of blue light, shimmering particles and rippling distortion spiralling outward from the point of impact, then holding steady and pulsing. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Cyberpunk City Portal
events.detail: Over-the-shoulder third-person view of a figure holding a glowing blue portal device, seen from behind. Directly ahead the portal has snapped fully open into a huge, crystal-clear circular gateway that completely fills the centre of the frame — and beyond it, edge to edge, a vast neon-lit CYBERPUNK CITY at night: towering skyscrapers stacked with glowing holographic signs, dense rain-slick streets far below, flying vehicles streaming between the buildings, purple and cyan light flooding out through the gateway and washing over the figure and the dim metal chamber around it. The city is bright, sharp and dominant, not faint — it is the main subject of the shot. Unreal Engine 5, ray-traced reflections, volumetric haze, hyper-realistic, 8K. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Forest Portal
events.detail: Over-the-shoulder third-person view of a figure holding a glowing blue portal device, seen from behind. Directly ahead the portal has snapped fully open into a huge, crystal-clear circular gateway that completely fills the centre of the frame — and beyond it, edge to edge, a dense SUNLIT FOREST: tall green trees, thick shafts of golden light pouring down through the canopy, ferns and drifting pollen, a mossy floor stretching into the woods, warm green daylight flooding out through the gateway and washing over the figure and the dim metal chamber around it. The forest is bright, sharp and dominant, not faint — it is the main subject of the shot. Unreal Engine 5, ray-traced lighting, volumetric god rays, hyper-realistic, 8K. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Portal Blast
events.detail: The figure thrusts the device forward and a surging bolt of blue portal energy fires straight ahead, crackling with electric arcs and trailing shimmering particles, then bursts against the far wall in a ripple of distortion before the device settles back to a steady hum. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

events.name: Close Portal
events.detail: The swirling portal ahead collapses inward, its vortex spiralling tighter and its glow drawing down to a single bright point before it winks out with a soft shimmer, leaving only the dim fog-filled chamber and the device's faint blue hum. The main subject stays EXACTLY ONE in frame — a single main character, no second copy of the main subject, no duplicate and no clone of it.

scene.jumpPrompt: The figure springs upward off both feet, leaping high off the metal floor, its boots lifting clear of the ground before it drops back down and lands in a low crouch.
scene.crouchPrompt: The camera lowers toward the ground as the figure crouches down low, bending its knees and ducking into a compact, hunched stance; the viewpoint sinks smoothly to a low, near-ground vantage and settles there, close to the floor.
scene.standPrompt: The figure straightens back up out of the crouch, rising to full standing height as the camera lifts smoothly back to its normal eye-level vantage.
